"'''Elusion Illusion'''" is a short story written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]], available in [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]], [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 54|''Star Wars Magazine UK'' 54]], and on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]]. It chronicles the [[Mission to Corellia (Clone Wars)|Mission to Corellia]], seven days after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

{{Shortstory-stub}}
